notes.omega: TF dissociation rate (s^-1); Roberts et al. 2021
notes.kappa_human: Chromatin relaxation rate hESC (s^-1); Klemm et al. 2019
notes.kappa_mouse: Chromatin relaxation rate mESC (s^-1); Stadhouders et al. 2018
notes.g_midpoint: TF-nucleosome coupling midpoint (s^-1); from dG_coop = 0.1-0.5 kBT; Mirny 2010
notes.g_lo: Lower bound of g biophysical range (s^-1)
notes.g_hi: Upper bound of g biophysical range (s^-1)
notes.NC_H_illustrative: Illustrative N_c for human ESC; NOT an ab initio prediction; g constrained from same literature as predicted range
notes.NC_M_illustrative: Predicted N_c for mouse = kappa_mouse/kappa_human x NC_H_illustrative
notes.NC_FIT_H: Empirical N_c from sigmoid fit to human CRISPR screen data
notes.NC_FIT_M: Empirical N_c from sigmoid fit to mouse CRISPR screen data
notes.t_max_h: Maximum Gillespie simulation time in seconds (= 18 hours)
notes.gillespie_seed: NumPy random seed for Gillespie simulations
notes.permutation_seed: NumPy random seed for permutation test (pre-specified)
notes.cv_seed: NumPy random seed for cross-validation splits
notes.outlier_SD_threshold: Pre-specified outlier criterion: identity score > this many SD below group mean for N_gene bin
